headline: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) Stock Could Be 6.9% Undervalued on GLP 1 Growth Narrative
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services (WST) stock has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with investors weighing its role in drug containment and delivery in relation to current valuation signals and recent returns over the past month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for West Pharmaceutical Services. At a share price of $327.95, West Pharmaceutical Services has seen strong momentum build over the past quarter, with a 35.85% 3 month share price return and a 52.46% 1 year total...
